name: Asset
description: Data about physical distribution network assets including poles, transformers, substations, and cables.

name: Customer
description: Data about customers including accounts, premises, meters, and service requests.

name: Financial
description: Financial data including general ledger, accounts payable and receivable, and regulatory reporting.

name: Employee
description: Data about employees including personal records, organisational structure, and payroll.

name: Network Topology
description: Data describing the electrical connectivity and topology of the distribution network.

name: Meter Data
description: Meter readings, consumption profiles, and interval data from customer meters.

name: Materials & Inventory
description: Data about inventory stock items, purchase orders, and warehouse transactions.
